cross_scene_arcs.title: Marriage to Separation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Henry's marriage with Debbie faces strain over unspoken desires about children and love, ending with mutual acceptance during a prison visit.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Tense marital breakfast with Debbie questioning Henry's love and desire for children.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Separated, with Henry calmly accepting Debbie's new relationship.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Robbery Suspect to Heist Planner
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Henry is caught in a bank robbery, sentenced to prison, adapts with Max's guidance, and after release, plans a new heist influenced by Max.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Held at gunpoint as an unwitting robbery suspect.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Committed to impersonating Lophakin for a bank heist.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether the heist will succeed and if Max will be further involved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Rebuilding Life After Prison
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After release, Henry commits to rebuilding his life on parole and forms a romantic relationship with Julie.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: In a romantic relationship, with a goal to rebuild life from the ground up.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How effectively he can rebuild his life post-parole.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Julie and Henry's Relationship Evolution
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Julie's relationship with Henry begins with a car accident, develops through shared moments and trust-building, faces a breakup, and ends with reconciliation in Los Angeles.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Romantic relationship solidified with a kiss below the Hollywood Sign

cross_scene_arcs.title: Julie's Decision to Leave Buffalo
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Julie plans to leave Buffalo after her play but later changes her mind, indicating a shift in her life plans.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Announces departure from Buffalo after the play
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Decides not to go west, plans have changed
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: What she will do instead is unspecified

cross_scene_arcs.title: Julie's Involvement in Henry's Robbery Plan
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Julie learns of Henry's plan to rob a bank via a tunnel to her theatre, becomes a trusted confidante, and agrees to facilitate his audition, deepening her involvement.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Amused by Henry's disclosure of the robbery plan
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Trusted insider who arranges Henry's audition
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Consequences of the robbery plan are still pending

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Life Sentence to Barbershop Freedom
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Max transitions from a life-term inmate who deliberately avoids parole to a released prisoner struggling with panic, eventually finding routine in his barbershop.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Free man working in his barbershop
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His anxiety and ability to cope with life outside prison

cross_scene_arcs.title: Max and Henry's Prison-to-Freedom Bond
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Max mentors Henry in prison, helps him upon release, collaborates on a heist plan, conflicts over secrecy, and maintains a connection through a postcard.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Receiving a postcard from Henry after his departure
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Tension between trust and secrecy in their partnership

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Vault Heist: Planning to Disruption
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Max drives the heist from planning with Henry, motivates Joe, vets Frank, accesses the vault cash, but faces betrayal and disruption during the getaway.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Heist cash secured but getaway compromised
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The consequences of Henry's departure and the heist's aftermath
